custody_adjustment.note: Form 509, Line 22: Parenting Time Percentage credit, 10% at 80-124 overnights, 30% at 125-163 overnights. Shared Equal Placement (164+ overnights each household, Rule 503(d)) uses a materially different worksheet (each child counted as half in each household) not modeled here -- the 30% credit is extended as an approximation beyond 163 nights, disclosed.

deviation_note: This calculator approximates Delaware's Melson Formula: no adjustment for a parent's other dependent children (Rule 502(e), 70% multiplier), no private-school primary expense (Rule 503(c)), and health insurance/childcare are added as flat combined figures rather than the worksheet's exact 3/4-vs-1/2 premium-sharing split (Rule 503(b)(3)). Shared Equal Placement (164+ overnights each) and the Low-Income Adjustment (Rule 506) are not modeled.
